docs.title: Regintel
docs.text: Regintel scans software repositories for regulatory signals, maps evidence to frameworks, and produces artifacts that teams can use in CI and release checks.

docs.title: v1.0 Highlights
docs.text:
• Stable JSON contracts for all machine-readable CLI outputs (meta.tool, meta.schema_version).
  • Pip-installable CLI entry points for every core workflow.
  • Full framework coverage tests across all bundled fixture repositories.
  • Monitoring and release gates for continuous compliance checks.
  • Multi-language structural scanning across Python, TypeScript, Java, Go, and .NET/C#.
  • Incremental cache and parallel file scanning for large repository performance.
  • Benchmark harness with labeled-corpus precision/recall trend reporting and CI regression gating.

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
python -m pip install zerantiq-regintel

regintel-scan --path . --scope full > /tmp/scan.json
regintel-applicability --signals /tmp/scan.json --format markdown

docs.title: Core Workflows
docs.text:
• Repository signal scan: regintel-scan
  • AST structural scan: regintel-ast-scan
  • Applicability scoring: regintel-applicability
  • Deadlines and updates: regintel-deadlines, regintel-feed-sync
  • Continuous monitoring: regintel-snapshot, regintel-trend, regintel-dashboard
  • Policy gating: regintel-gate
  • Benchmark quality harness: regintel-benchmark

docs.title: Install from PyPI
docs.text: python -m pip install zerantiq-regintel

docs.title: Verify CLI Entry Points
docs.text:
regintel-scan --help
regintel-applicability --help
regintel-gate --help

docs.title: Local Development Install
docs.text:
python -m pip install -e ".[dev,docs]"
make check

docs.title: Build Documentation
docs.text:
python -m pip install -e ".[docs]"
mkdocs serve

docs.title: Agent Integrations
docs.text: Regintel supports agent-first workflows and also ships standalone CLI entry points.

docs.title: Claude Code
docs.text:
• Marketplace plugin via conductor.json and .claude-plugin/plugin.json
  • Local skill install via skills/regintel/SKILL.md
  • Keep skills/regintel/SKILL.md mirrored from the canonical SKILL.md so Claude Code follows the same output contract as other agents.

docs.title: OpenAI Codex
docs.text:
• Agent manifest: agents/openai.yaml
  • Implicit skill invocation enabled for repository scans and follow-up checks

docs.title: Integration Pattern
docs.text:
1. Agent runs regintel-scan and regintel-applicability.
  2. Optional follow-up tools run based on context (regintel-ast-scan, regintel-deadlines, regintel-diff).
  3. Monitoring and release pipelines run (regintel-snapshot, regintel-trend, regintel-gate).

Use the JSON meta block as the compatibility check for tool-chain integrations.

docs.title: Script Contracts
docs.text: Regintel v1.0 defines a stable JSON interface contract across all machine-readable script outputs.

docs.title: Common Contract Header
docs.text:
Every JSON output starts with:

{
  "meta": {
    "tool": "tool_name",
    "schema_version": "1.0.0"
  }
}

tool identifies the producer and schema_version tracks contract compatibility.

docs.title: Covered Scripts
docs.text:
• repo_signal_scan.py
  • ast_signal_scan.py
  • applicability_score.py
  • check_deadlines.py
  • change_diff.py
  • snapshot_store.py
  • trend_report.py
  • sync_regulatory_feeds.py
  • compliance_gate.py
  • benchmark_harness.py

docs.title: Compatibility Rules
docs.text:
• Patch/minor updates keep backward-compatible keys and field meanings.
  • Breaking changes require a major schema_version update.
  • Consumers should validate meta.tool and meta.schema_version before parsing downstream fields.

docs.title: Full Schemas
docs.text: See references/script-schemas.md for per-script payload examples.

docs.title: CI Monitoring Pipeline
docs.text: This tutorial runs the same monitoring flow used in scheduled CI.

docs.title: 1. Run Baseline Scan and Snapshot
docs.text:
regintel-scan --path . --scope full > /tmp/scan.json
regintel-applicability --signals /tmp/scan.json --format json > /tmp/applicability.json
regintel-ast-scan --path . --format json > /tmp/ast.json
regintel-deadlines --input examples/developments.json --format json > /tmp/deadlines.json

regintel-snapshot \
  --scan /tmp/scan.json \
  --applicability /tmp/applicability.json \
  --deadlines /tmp/deadlines.json \
  --ast /tmp/ast.json \
  --snapshot-dir .regintel/snapshots \
  --tag baseline \
  --format json

docs.title: 2. Run Follow-Up Snapshot and Trends
docs.text:
regintel-snapshot \
  --scan /tmp/scan.json \
  --snapshot-dir .regintel/snapshots \
  --tag nightly \
  --format json

regintel-trend --snapshot-dir .regintel/snapshots --format markdown
regintel-dashboard --snapshot-dir .regintel/snapshots --format html --output /tmp/regintel-dashboard.html

docs.title: 3. Enforce Gate in CI
docs.text:
regintel-gate \
  --policy examples/compliance-gate-policy.json \
  --scan /tmp/scan.json \
  --deadlines /tmp/deadlines.json \
  --ast /tmp/ast.json \
  --format json

If gate checks fail, the command exits with code 1.

docs.title: Pip CLI Workflow
docs.text: The v1.0 package exposes stable CLI entry points for all major workflows.

docs.title: Install
docs.text: python -m pip install zerantiq-regintel

docs.title: Scan and Score
docs.text:
regintel-scan --path tests/fixtures/repos/ai-saas --scope full > /tmp/scan.json
regintel-applicability --signals /tmp/scan.json --format markdown

docs.title: Compare Snapshots
docs.text: regintel-diff --old examples/old-scan.json --new examples/new-scan.json --format markdown

docs.title: Feed Sync and Deadlines
docs.text:
regintel-feed-sync --config examples/regulatory-feed-config.json --format json > /tmp/developments.json
regintel-deadlines --input /tmp/developments.json --format markdown

docs.title: Benchmark Quality Gate
docs.text: regintel-benchmark --labels tests/fixtures/benchmarks/labeled-corpus.json --fixtures-root tests/fixtures/repos --baseline tests/fixtures/benchmarks/baseline-metrics.json --policy examples/benchmark-gate-policy.json --format markdown

docs.title: Contract Compatibility
docs.text:
Machine-readable outputs include:

{
  "meta": {
    "tool": "repo_signal_scan",
    "schema_version": "1.0.0"
  }
}

Treat schema_version as the API contract version for JSON consumers.
